build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline --prod=false --ignore-scripts && cd apps/web && NODE_OPTIONS=--max_old_space_size=16384 pnpm exec next build --webpack

deploy.preDeployCommand: cd apps/web && node scripts/recover-booking-availability-migration.cjs && pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy
deploy.startCommand: cd apps/web && pnpm exec next start -p ${PORT:-3000}
